---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in LifeQuest
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Device & Environment

- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S23]
- OS Version: [e.g. iOS 17.2, Android 14]
- App Version: [e.g. 1.0.3]
- Build: [Debug / Release]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. Logs, crash reports, etc.

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (app crashes / data loss)
- [ ] High (feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken)
- [ ] Low (minor UI issue)
